entity.summary: Stacks ecosystem DeFi and exchange protocol. HEI records ALEX as a protocol-level DEX entity and consolidates the CoinGecko and DefiLlama candidate rows into one record.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0052 and hei_unadded_0053 as one entity. ALEX has event history beyond a thin database listing and should be improved later with stronger incident-specific sources.

events.title: ALEX disclosed security incident / exploit context
events.description: ALEX is included as an event-backed DEX/protocol record because the protocol has public security-incident history in addition to exchange database references.
events.notes: Incident details should be refined later with the strongest official postmortem or recovery-plan source available.

evidence.title: ALEX official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to preserve ALEX identity.

evidence.title: ALEX Lab exploit / recovery coverage
evidence.notes: Secondary source used to support the public exploit/incident event.

evidence.title: CoinGecko / DefiLlama references for ALEX
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0052 and hei_unadded_0053 referred to the same ALEX candidate.
